data.title: The US and Iran reached an agreement on "some overall issues" during the second round of negotiations.
data.description: In the second round of Iran-US talks that concluded on the 17th, the two sides reached an agreement on some general issues. After the negotiating delegations briefed their respective governments, Iran and the US will continue to discuss details. On the 6th of this month, representatives from Iran and the United States held indirect talks in Muscat, the capital of Oman, and reached a consensus on continuing the negotiations, but serious differences remained on core issues. The second round of indirect talks between the US and Iran began on the 17th in Geneva, Switzerland. The talks were held at the Omani diplomatic mission in Geneva. (CCTV News)

data.title: AMC Entertainment Pursues $2.5 Billion Refinancing Plan
data.description: AMC Entertainment is aiming to secure approximately $2.5 billion from credit investors to refinance its current debt obligations. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's strategic move to manage its financial liabilities. The theater operator is exploring options to restructure its debt, which could potentially improve its financial stability and operational flexibility. This initiative comes as AMC continues to navigate the challenges posed by the evolving entertainment landscape and fluctuating consumer demand. The refinancing plan is part of AMC's broader strategy to strengthen its balance sheet and ensure long-term sustainability in the competitive market.

data.title: Nakamoto Inc. to Acquire BTC Inc and UTXO Management
data.description: Nakamoto Inc. has announced merger agreements to acquire BTC Inc, a prominent Bitcoin media and events company, and UTXO Management, an investment firm specializing in Bitcoin enterprises. According to NS3.AI, the acquisitions will be executed using Nakamoto’s common stock and are intended to diversify the company's portfolio across media, asset management, and advisory services. BTC Inc and UTXO Management are expected to contribute recurring revenue and bolster Nakamoto’s growth strategy, which includes Bitcoin accumulation and future strategic acquisitions.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Goolsby: If inflation declines, there will be multiple more rate cuts in the future.
data.description: Federal Reserve's Goolsby stated that service sector inflation is "not mild"; goods with higher tariffs tend to see larger price increases; if inflation declines, there will be multiple more rate cuts in the future; this does not mean we will reach an agreement soon, but the path to an agreement has been opened; 3% is considered an accommodative target for the neutral interest rate; some evidence is needed that inflation is returning to 2%. (Golden Ten)

data.title: USD/CAD Experiences Short-Term Increase Following CPI Release
data.description: The USD/CAD exchange rate saw a brief rise of over 10 points after the release of the Consumer Price Index (CPI). According to ChainCatcher, the current rate is reported at 1.3664.

data.title: Bitcoin mining company Hive saw its revenue increase by 219% year-on-year, but suffered a net loss of $91 million due to accelerated depreciation.
data.description: Bitcoin mining company Hive announced that in the third quarter of its fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, the company's revenue reached $93.1 million, a year-over-year increase of 219% and a quarter-over-quarter increase of 7%. Hive also achieved a record high quarterly revenue last November. Hive attributed the revenue growth to the overall growth of its Bitcoin hashrate clusters and the BUZZ high-performance computing platform. However, due to accelerated depreciation and non-cash revaluation adjustments related to its expansion in Paraguay, Hive Mining Company incurred a net loss of $91.3 million, which hampered its success in revenue growth.

data.title: Dragonfly Capital Secures $650 Million for Fourth Crypto Fund Amid Market Challenges
data.description: Dragonfly Capital has successfully closed its fourth investment fund, raising $650 million, despite characterizing the current crypto venture landscape as a challenging 'mass extinction event.' According to NS3.AI, the firm is dedicated to investing in the transition of cryptocurrency towards financial infrastructure, with a focus on stablecoins, onchain finance, and tokenized real-world assets. This strategic move reflects Dragonfly Capital's confidence in foundational sectors of the crypto market, even as it faces significant headwinds.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | France and India Elevate Strategic Partnership to Global Level
data.description: French President Emmanuel Macron announced that France and India have decided to enhance their strategic partnership to a special global strategic level. According to Jin10, this diplomatic move signifies a significant advancement in bilateral relations between the two nations. The elevation of the partnership is expected to have substantial implications in various sectors, including defense, trade, and technology, reflecting the growing importance of collaboration on the global stage. This development underscores the commitment of both countries to strengthen ties and work together on international challenges.

data.title: Ripple CEO: The probability of the Clarity Act passing by the end of April is 80%.
data.description: CoinDesk reported on its X platform that Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse believes there is an 80% chance the CLARITY bill will pass by the end of April. Additionally, Polymarket currently reports a 61% probability that the CLARITY bill will be signed in 2026.

data.title: BitMine increased its holdings by 45,759 ETH last week, bringing its total holdings to 4.3715 million ETH.
data.description: According to an official announcement, BitMine increased its holdings by 45,759 ETH last week, bringing its total holdings to 4.3715 million ETH, representing 3.62% of the total Ethereum supply (120.7 million ETH). Of this, BitMine has staked 3,040,483 ETH, which, at the current ETH price of $1,998 per ETH, is worth approximately $6.1 billion.

data.title: A whale deposited 500,000 USDC into Hyperliquid to go long on WLFI, and is currently experiencing a paper loss of over 1 million USD.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale (0x9b3b) deposited another 500,000 USDC into Hyperliquid today to continue its long position on WLFI. This address currently holds 42.47 million WLFI long positions, worth $4.26 million, with a floating loss exceeding $1 million.

data.title: Canada's Inflation Rate Slightly Declines to 2.3% in Latest Report
data.description: Canada's headline inflation rate experienced a slight decrease last month, reaching 2.3%, contrary to economist predictions that it would remain at 2.4%. Bloomberg posted on X that this change comes as the previous year's temporary federal sales tax break continues to influence annual price growth. The adjustment in inflation figures reflects ongoing economic dynamics and the impact of fiscal measures on consumer prices.

data.title: Aave Labs Proposes Revenue Shift to DAO Treasury
data.description: Aave Labs has introduced a governance proposal titled 'Aave Will Win Framework' on February 12. According to Foresight News, the proposal suggests directing 100% of the revenue from Aave-branded products into the Aave DAO treasury, with a focus on the Aave V4 roadmap. Currently, the proposal is in the governance temperature check phase. The proposal highlights that with increasing regulatory clarity in some markets, Aave believes it is an opportune moment to advance the token value recirculation.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 68,000 USDT with a 1.25% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 17, 2026, 13:32 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 68,000 USDT and is now trading at 67,993.007813 USDT, with a narrowed 1.25% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Altcoin ETF Race Heats Up, Filings Pile Up Despite Choppy Flows
data.description:
Numerous altcoins join the ETF rally, including Canary's uncanny bid for a presidential coin-based ETF product.
source: https://dailycoin.com/altcoin-etf-race-heats-up-filings-pile-up/?utm_source=cryptopanic&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Blackstone Nears $2.5 Billion Acquisition of Champions Group
data.description: Blackstone is reportedly in advanced discussions to purchase the residential services provider Champions Group for approximately $2.5 billion. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the situation, that the negotiations are progressing, although no final agreement has been reached yet. The acquisition, if finalized, would mark a significant expansion for Blackstone in the residential services sector. Further details about the potential deal remain undisclosed at this time.

data.title: A newly created address transferred 25 million WLFI tokens, worth $2.52 million, from Binance.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created address withdrew 25 million WLFI from Binance, worth approximately $2.52 million.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Iran's Supreme Leader Defends Nuclear Rights Amid International Tensions
data.description: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has asserted that nuclear energy is an inalienable right for the nation, emphasizing its inclusion in the guidelines of the International Atomic Energy Agency. According to Jin10, Khamenei stated that all countries possess the right to have nuclear facilities and uranium enrichment capabilities, framing it as a sovereign right. He questioned the United States' interference in Iran's nuclear affairs, highlighting ongoing geopolitical tensions surrounding the issue.

data.title: US-listed company DDC increased its holdings by 80 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to over 2,000 bitcoins.
data.description: DDC Enterprise Limited (DDC), a US-listed company, announced today that it has increased its holdings of Bitcoin by 80, bringing its total treasury holdings to 2,068 BTC, with an average holding price of $84,944. This latest purchase marks DDC's sixth consecutive week of increasing its Bitcoin holdings, representing a 74.8% increase since the beginning of 2026 and solidifying Bitcoin's position as a fundamental component of the company's financial strategy. The transaction was reportedly completed within DDC's established capital deployment framework, which emphasizes robust scaling, liquidity management, and balance sheet strength. The company's strategy aims to address market cyclical fluctuations while enhancing long-term per-share value. (Businesswire)

data.title: YouTube Star Salish Matter Expands to Television
data.description: Salish Matter, known for her success on YouTube and as a Sephora influencer, is set to make her television debut. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting her journey from online platforms to mainstream media. Matter has gained significant popularity through her engaging content and collaborations, which have resonated with a wide audience. Her transition to television marks a new chapter in her career, expanding her reach beyond digital platforms. This move is expected to further solidify her presence in the entertainment industry, showcasing her versatility and appeal to a broader audience.
